payload.answer: SQL debug access is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false, so the query was not executed.
citations: Input command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution is needed for an administrative SQL debug request.

details: No query was run against memory_cards.
No memory was created, modified, or deleted.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED to allow admin SQL debugging.
Use a non-SQL diagnostic or supported admin endpoint if available.
Retry the same query only after the debug SQL flag is explicitly turned on.
